summary: Exa offers HTTP APIs for Search, Contents, and Answer at `https://api.exa.ai` using your Exa API key via `x-api-key` or `Authorization: Bearer`, plus MCP servers at `https://mcp.exa.ai/mcp` and `https://websetsmcp.exa.ai/mcp` authenticated with the same key (header or `exaApiKey` query param for Websets MCP).
